Azure API Management Custom Routing Demo

1. Traffic Manager Profile Setup

# Azure CLI commands to create Traffic Manager profile
az network traffic-manager profile create \
    --name myTrafficManager \
    --resource-group myResourceGroup \
    --routing-method Geographic \
    --unique-dns-name myapp-tm

2. Add Regional Endpoints

# Add East US endpoint
az network traffic-manager endpoint create \
    --name eastus \
    --profile-name myTrafficManager \
    --resource-group myResourceGroup \
    --type azureEndpoints \
    --target-resource-id /subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/myapim-eastus \
    --geo-mapping GEO-NA \
    --endpoint-status Enabled

# Add West Europe endpoint
az network traffic-manager endpoint create \
    --name westeurope \
    --profile-name myTrafficManager \
    --resource-group myResourceGroup \
    --type azureEndpoints \
    --target-resource-id /subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/myapim-westeurope \
    --geo-mapping GEO-EU \
    --endpoint-status Enabled

3. Test Regional Routing

Select a region to simulate request from:
